privacy.intro: We take your privacy seriously. Here is what you need to know:
privacy.noPersonalDataText: We do not collect or store any personal information like names, emails, or IP addresses.
privacy.anonymousIdText: A random player ID is automatically generated to enable gameplay. This ID is stored in your browser's local storage and is not linked to any personal data.
privacy.simpleAnalyticsText: We use Simple Analytics to understand general website usage - like how many people visit - without tracking individuals or using cookies.
privacy.gameDataText: When you play a multiplayer game, your moves and anonymous player ID are stored in a temporary game room on our servers. This room exists only for the duration of the game and is deleted when the game ends or when you use the delete button below.
privacy.localStorageTitle: What We Store on Your Device
privacy.localStorageText: Your browser stores the following locally: your anonymous player ID, your single-player win and loss counts, and a move history from your last 3 days of games. Game history older than 3 days is automatically removed. None of this data is linked to your identity.
privacy.anonymityText: We don't collect personal data, track you across the web, or build user profiles. Note that Google AdSense (used for ads on this site) places advertising cookies — see the Advertising section above for details and opt-out options.
privacy.adsenseText: This site uses Google AdSense to display ads. Google uses cookies to serve ads based on your previous visits to this and other websites.
privacy.adsenseOptOut: You can opt out of personalised advertising at
privacy.deleteText: This will permanently clear all local data stored on this device (player ID, scores, and game history) and delete any active multiplayer game rooms you are part of.
privacy.deleteAlert: All your data has been cleared and your active game rooms have been deleted.

about.intro: A free, no-signup Rock Paper Scissors game that works on any device — no download, no account, no tracking.
about.projectText: This site exists to give anyone a clean, instant way to play Rock Paper Scissors — against the computer or with a friend in real time. No ads interrupt the game, no accounts are required, and no personal data is collected.
about.whoText: Built and maintained by Nick, a web developer. This is a side project — made for fun and to keep the game free and accessible to anyone with a browser.
about.contactText: For questions, feedback, or partnership requests, reach out by email:

terms.intro: Please read these terms carefully before using rps-game.online. By accessing or using this site, you agree to be bound by them.
terms.acceptanceText: By using rps-game.online you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please stop using the site.
terms.useText: rps-game.online is a free online game provided for personal, non-commercial use. You agree not to misuse the service, attempt to disrupt its operation, or use it in any way that violates applicable laws or regulations.
terms.ipText: All content on this site — including the game design, graphics, code, and written content — is the property of rps-game.online. You may not copy, reproduce, or distribute it without prior written permission.
terms.disclaimerText: This site is provided "as is" without any warranty of any kind. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or suitable for any particular purpose.
terms.liabilityText: To the fullest extent permitted by law, rps-game.online and its owner are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of or inability to use this site.
terms.adsText: This site uses Google AdSense to display advertisements. Google may use cookies to serve ads based on your browsing history. You can opt out at adssettings.google.com. We are not responsible for the content of third-party ads.
terms.changesText: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the site after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.contactText: For questions about these terms, contact us at:
